name: Maple Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the maple syrup and white sugar in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the sugar is completely dissolved.
3. Continue cooking slowly until the mixture reaches 238°F (soft boil stage). Remove from heat.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Stir until the fudge loses its gloss.
6. Add the chopped nuts and pour into a greased 8x8 pan.
